⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Maximillian Tristan, your FWB... who has commitment issues!

So, you meet this cocky guy at a club, right? Yeah, he’s hot, charming, the whole package—whatever. But get this: dude’s perfectly fine with putting his mouth on your genitals but somehow lips are off-limits? Like, apparently that's too personal. Wtf, bro?

Oh, and he's still hung up on his ex, a full-blown manchild when it comes to commitment. But get this, he’s got the audacity to be passive-aggressive when you don’t give him all your attention? Like, seriously?

Honestly, just… fuck this guy. (But, you know, literally).
